:51 am by liyu - Changed lines 1-2 from: Updated 27th September 2018 by Liyu Wang. to: Updated 7th March 2019 by Liyu Wang. Changed lines 15-16 from: The OpenRoACH is a 15-cm long and 200-gram hexapod crawling robot. It is the smallest legged robot r

crawling robot. It is the smallest legged robot running the Robot Operating System (ROS) onboard. With two Pololu metal gear DC motors and a Beagle Bone Blue board, OpenRoACH is underactuated, affordable, fully open-source. Fabrication is straightfo

able, fully open-source. Fabrication is straightforward with bench-top fast-prototyping machines such as a laser cutter and a 3D printer. Assembly can be done manually with hot glue, super glue and screws by one person in two hours.\\ to: The OpenRoA

rews by one person in two hours.\\ to: The OpenRoACH is a 15-cm long and 200-gram hexapod crawling robot. It is the smallest legged robot running the Robot Operating System (ROS) onboard. With two Pololu metal gear DC motors and a Beagle Bone Blue bo

olu metal gear DC motors and a Beagle Bone Blue board, OpenRoACH is underactuated, affordable ($150) , and fully open-source. Fabrication is straightforward with bench-top fast-prototyping machines such as a laser cutter and a 3D printer. Assembly ca

ch as a laser cutter and a 3D printer. Assembly can be done manually with hot glue, super glue and screws by one person in two hours.\\ Changed line 19 from: * dynamical walking and running capabilities on multiple surfaces and terrain to: * dynamica

es on multiple surfaces and terrain to: * dynamical walking and running capabilities on multiple surfaces and terrain . Added lines 21-22: * durable with 24-hour continuous burn-in test walking on a tread mill. * 200 gram payload capacity dynamically

before: Duncan Haldane and anonymous students\\ !! Overview\\ The OpenRoACH is a 15-cm long and 200-gram hexapod crawling robot. As the first documented open-source legged robot platform, it is affordable with accessible materials and off-the-shelf c

able with accessible materials and off-the-shelf components. Additionally, fabrication is relative easy and straightforward with bench-top fast-prototyping machines such as a laser cutter and a 3D printer. Assembly can be done manually with hot glue,

nter. Assembly can be done manually with hot glue, super glue and screws.\\ The present version is version 4.0. !! Mechanical Design and Fabrication\\ CAD files (Andrew)\\ Fabrication process (John)\\ Assembly guide (Patrick)\\ [+[[Fabrication Instru

Assembly guide (Patrick)\\ [+[[Fabrication Instructions| '''Fabrication Instructions''']]+] !! Sensors\\ !!! Line scanner sensor [[LineScanner | Line Scanner]] !!! Proximity sensor and electromagnet [[ LightSensorAndElectromagnet | Light Sensor and

[[ LightSensorAndElectromagnet | Light Sensor and Electromagnet]] !! Electronics and Microcontrollers\\ !! Locomotion Control\\ !! Version history\\ v4.0:\\ July 2017-August 2017\\ Chassis middle lowered to accommodate electronics.\\ Tested higher s

ered to accommodate electronics.\\ Tested higher speed motors, [[https://www.pololu.com/product/998 | 50:1 Micro Metal Gearmotor HP]].\\ v3.0:\\ June 2017-July 2017\\ Legs from C-shape to O-shape.\\ Two-piece 3D-printable pulleys and an improved 3D-p

wo-piece 3D-printable pulleys and an improved 3D-printable motor carrier.\\ Reuse the initial motor driver on Zumy board, remove many wiring cables.\\ v2.0:\\ February 2017-May 2017\\ Chassis made from paperboard, nylon and PET.\\ Dual shafts, [[http

m paperboard, nylon and PET.\\ Dual shafts, [[https://www.pololu.com/product/994 | 298:1 Micro Metal Gearmotor HP]], three-piece 3D-printable pulleys, timing belts, and a 3D-printable motor carrier.\\ Self-contained with 22-gram battery.\\ v1.5:\\ No

Self-contained with 22-gram battery.\\ v1.5:\\ November 2016 - January 2017\\ Chassis made from PET and nylon.\\ Leg transmission bar made from Delrin.\\ Self-contained with onboard Zumy board, [[https://www.pololu.com/product/1213 | Dual MC33926 Mo

ps://www.pololu.com/product/1213 | Dual MC33926 Motor Driver Carrier]], 50-gram battery, and line scanner sensor.\\ Realized path following with ∞ trajectory three times.\\ v1.0:\\ Before October 2016\\ Only a 1.5x scaled VelociRoACH chassis ma

r 2016\\ Only a 1.5x scaled VelociRoACH chassis made from paperboard and nylon with a [[https://www.tamiyausa.com/product/item.php?product-id=70097 | Tamiya twin motor gearbox]].\\ AutoCAD drawings, assembly guide, and bill of materials for v1.0 are
